prompt: I need to hand this model off to a colleague who has never seen it. Can you produce a complete Logic Map so they can understand every business rule without opening the spreadsheet?
assertions: Inspects the model via idfa-ops to discover all Named Ranges and their formulas
Produces a Logic Map listing every Named Range with its business rule in plain English
Shows the dependency chain — which inputs feed which calculations
Groups the map by layer (Assumptions → Calculations → Output)
Each formula description is understandable without Excel knowledge (e.g., 'Year 2 Revenue = Year 1 Revenue grown by the annual growth rate')
Does NOT include cell coordinate references in the Logic Map — only Named Range names
